title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown argues on the Dwarkesh Patel podcast that inventing general relativity represents a final test for AI systems, implying that achieving breakthroughs of that magnitude would demonstrate advanced reasoning and scientific understanding beyond current capabilities.
